<!--
Title guidelines:
- Use the imperative mood: "Fix buffering issue" not "Fixed buffering issue"
- Capitalize first letter, no trailing punctuation
- Keep it short and descriptive — it becomes a changelog entry
- Do NOT use Conventional Commits format (feat:, fix:, chore:, etc.)

For substantial new features or changes affecting multiple sub-projects,
please open a Discussion first: https://github.com/jellyfin/jellyfin-web/discussions
-->

### Changes
<!--
Describe what this PR does and why. Include:
1. Why the changes are being made (reference the issue)
2. How you approached the problem (for non-trivial changes)
For UI changes, include before/after screenshots.
-->


### Issues
<!--
Reference issues with keywords so GitHub auto-closes them on merge.
Use: Fixes #1234 / Closes #1234 / Addresses #1234
If there is no related issue, write "None".
-->

Fixes #

### Code Assistance Disclosure
<!--
Required per the LLM policy: https://jellyfin.org/docs/general/contributing/llm-policies
If AI/LLM tools (Copilot, Claude, ChatGPT, etc.) contributed code, describe how.
If not used, write "None".
-->


---

- [ ] I have read and followed [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] I have tested these changes locally.
- [ ] New files I added are TypeScript (`.ts`/`.tsx`), not JavaScript.
- [ ] Translation changes (if any) were made via [Weblate](https://translate.jellyfin.org/), not by editing `src/strings/` directly (except `en-us.json`).
- [ ] I have marked this PR as a **draft** if it is not yet ready for review.
- [ ] I have reviewed another open [web PR](https://github.com/jellyfin/jellyfin-web/pulls).
